review.revisit_condition: Replace or revise this baseline only after component-specific rights evidence, an exact channel review, and maintainer or qualified legal approval are recorded together.
review.notes: This review establishes a conservative containment policy. Revision 3 records the exact official Rerelease source match and deterministic dependency/SBOM evidence without changing any rights or publication decision. It is not a legal opinion, copyright-holder permission, or release approval.

evidence.locator: checked-in effective Zaero asset identity inventory
evidence.supports: Identifies runtime media without granting permission to distribute it.

evidence.locator: Current policy and Records still required
evidence.supports: Records that source and media gates are independent, tools-only requires a history-clean root, and local-full is permanently private.
Provides hashes for all supplied comparison trees and embeds the verified official Rerelease source identity; legacy and Zaero acquisition origins remain unresolved.
Proves all 144 supplied Rerelease paths and blobs exactly match the selected immutable official commit/subtree; it grants no rights in Zaero additions.

evidence.locator: pinned vcpkg closure, SPDX schema, license hashes, and toolchain components
evidence.supports: Pins and validates the exact fmt/JsonCpp/build-helper license bytes and records compiler/static-runtime scope as engineering-only NOASSERTION evidence.
Defines fail-closed component, mode, repository, CI, source-archive, and release-channel policy.
Defines non-promotable readiness profiles and the non-waivable release gates.
Contains the GPL-2.0 text; its presence does not establish that every repository addition was licensed by its holder.

evidence.locator: Zaero source additions; Zaero maps and media; dependency notices
evidence.supports: Records observed upstream and dependency licenses, unresolved Zaero rights, and required exact notice harvesting.

components.description: The Rerelease gameplay DLL tree with Zaero-derived behavior and integration changes intermingled with the upstream substrate.
components.holder: Mixed upstream holders and unresolved holders of Zaero-derived additions
components.jurisdiction_scope: All public source and binary distribution channels; no jurisdiction-specific grant is recorded.
components.revisit_condition: Record a holder-authorized license or permission for every Zaero-derived source addition and verify compatibility with the complete GPL-covered work.
components.notes: GPL-2.0 coverage of the upstream substrate is not treated as a grant for unrelated or intermingled commercial additions.

components.description: Checked-in Rerelease reference material reconstructed from a supplied tree whose 144 paths and blobs exactly match a pinned official commit/subtree.
components.holder: id Software and other upstream contributors identified by the pinned official repository history
components.jurisdiction_scope: All public repository and source-archive channels.
components.revisit_condition: Complete the file/scope/outbound-license review and exact notice bundle for the selected official commit before changing this component from unknown.
components.notes: Official source identity is resolved. Distribution remains unknown because identity and an observed GPL text do not by themselves complete file-level scope, combined-work, channel, and notice review.

components.description: Compatibility tests and source-derived audit records that encode detailed Zaero behavior or supplied-source facts.
components.holder: ZaeREo contributors and unresolved holders of any protectable Zaero-derived expression
components.jurisdiction_scope: All public repository, source-archive, CI, and release channels.
components.revisit_condition: Complete file-by-file authorship and protectable-expression review together with the gameplay source rights decision.
components.notes: Facts and original tests may be distributable on a different basis, but no blanket conclusion is encoded here.

components.description: Original Zaero maps, models, textures, images, sounds, sprites, cinematics, configuration, generated local derivatives such as glow maps, and other runtime media supplied by a user's installation.

external_inputs: Legitimate local Zaero installation: pak0.pak, pak1.pak, pak2.pak, and the nine documented loose runtime files

components.jurisdiction_scope: All project-operated public hosting, CI, source, editor, and release channels.
components.revisit_condition: Record holder identity and specific permission covering exact works, modification, hosting, sublicensing, attribution, and intended channels.
components.notes: Known hashes prove identity only. The current permitted operation is local import from a legitimate user installation, plus private local generation of derived runtime media from that import, not project redistribution.

components.description: Zaero episode configuration, mapdb fragment, and editor entity definitions.
components.holder: ZaeREo contributors; derivation and redistribution scope not yet reviewed file by file
components.jurisdiction_scope: Public runtime packages and editor-gamepack channels.
components.revisit_condition: Complete authorship, derivation, and license review for every shipped definition and generated editor output.
components.notes: Generated editor forms do not acquire a distribution grant merely because their generator is present.

components.description: The standard-library acquisition, material-generation, PAK, and runtime-validation scripts proposed for a future tools-only artifact.
components.holder: ZaeREo contributors; file-level authorship and outbound license approval pending
components.jurisdiction_scope: History-clean tools repository, CI, source-archive, and release-asset channels only.
components.revisit_condition: Complete independent-authorship and outbound-license review for each exact file and record immutable hashes in the tools distribution root.
components.notes: Listing these candidate files is not an allow-to-publish decision; every candidate remains unknown.

components.description: Notices and generated metadata proposed for the future tools-only package.

external_inputs: Generated ACQUIRE_AND_BUILD.txt, BUILD-METADATA.json, MANIFEST.json, SBOM.spdx.json, VERSION.txt, and exact license copies

components.holder: Mixed license authors and ZaeREo contributors; exact package scope review pending
components.revisit_condition: Render the exact mode-specific package, verify every byte and license scope, and record the reviewed immutable allowlist.
components.notes: The GPL text itself is redistributable verbatim, but its presence does not license the proposed tools or generated package as a whole.

components.description: fmt, JsonCpp, vcpkg build helpers, the MSVC compiler, and statically linked MSVC/runtime dependency bytes recorded for the Windows game DLL.

external_inputs: Pinned vcpkg-cmake and vcpkg-cmake-config build helpers
Microsoft Visual C++ 19.44.35222 and static runtime 14.44.35207

components.holder: fmt and JsonCpp copyright holders/contributors and Microsoft Corporation for the recorded compiler/runtime
components.jurisdiction_scope: Binary, source, SBOM, and notice bundles for all public DLL releases.
components.revisit_condition: Resolve the MSVC compiler/static-runtime outbound scope and tie the deterministic dependency SBOM/license bundle to the exact mode-specific binary and artifact manifest.
components.notes: Pinned vcpkg package versions, ABIs, and exact copyright bytes are validated and harvested. The generated SPDX record deliberately leaves Microsoft toolchain/runtime licensing as NOASSERTION, so publication remains blocked.

components.description: Repository documentation, automation, tests, and tools outside the separately enumerated candidate components.
components.holder: Mixed ZaeREo contributors and referenced upstream authors; file-level scope not yet reviewed
components.jurisdiction_scope: All public repository, history, source-archive, CI, and release channels.
components.revisit_condition: Inventory exact files, resolve overlaps into independently reviewable components, and record authorship and outbound-license decisions.
components.notes: This intentionally broad containment record cannot be used as a public allowlist. Exact mode records must override it only after review.

requirements: Every committed file and all transitive content must have a permitted component decision before this channel can change status.
channels.revisit_condition: Re-evaluate only after all gameplay-tree components and the complete tree are independently reviewed.
channels.notes: A public gameplay tree would expose unresolved code and definitions directly.

requirements: The complete reachable history must contain only permitted component bytes.
channels.revisit_condition: Re-evaluate only after an immutable, history-wide provenance audit passes.
channels.notes: A clean current tree cannot cure gated bytes retained in history.

requirements: Automatic tag archives must be included in the same component and history review as the repository.
channels.revisit_condition: Re-evaluate with the public Git tree and history channels.
channels.notes: Attaching a safe ZIP to a gameplay-tree tag would still publish the gated automatic source archive.

requirements: Logs must prove that no gated source, path, content, or secret-bearing diagnostic is emitted.
channels.revisit_condition: Re-evaluate after workflow data-flow and retained-log review.
channels.notes: Actions logs are treated as a distribution channel, not harmless diagnostics.

requirements: Every retained artifact member must be hash-bound to a permitted exact allowlist.
channels.revisit_condition: Re-evaluate after component rights, artifact inventory, and retention policy all pass.
channels.notes: DLLs, objects, stages, and packages may contain unresolved source-derived bytes.

requirements: Cache keys, contents, readers, retention, and restoration paths must exclude every gated byte.
channels.revisit_condition: Re-evaluate after a workflow cache threat and content audit.
channels.notes: Object and dependency caches can reproduce or expose gated source-derived output.

requirements: The exact artifact, source archive, repository ref, notices, SBOM, and mode policy must all be eligible together.
channels.revisit_condition: Re-evaluate only after a mode-specific policy and readiness record passes without non-waivable exceptions.
channels.notes: No current gameplay-tree release asset is authorized.

requirements: A DLL release must provide or durably link complete corresponding source and exact notices for the same commit and binary.
channels.revisit_condition: Re-evaluate only after the DLL code gate and exact corresponding-source inventory both pass.
channels.notes: A corresponding-source obligation does not create a missing license grant for Zaero-derived additions.

requirements: Every generated editor definition and bundled media reference must have an exact rights and derivation decision.
channels.revisit_condition: Re-evaluate after the editor source and every generated output are independently reviewed.
channels.notes: Editor outputs are a separate distribution channel and are not implicitly cleared by a runtime mode.

requirements: The separate root must contain only exact independently reviewed tools-only files.
channels.revisit_condition: Create and audit the history-clean root, then record its immutable identity and exact permitted tree.
channels.notes: The required distribution root does not yet have retained review evidence.

requirements: Every reachable object and commit in the tools root must match the exact permitted component and file allowlist.
channels.revisit_condition: Retain a history-wide object audit for the immutable publication ref.
channels.notes: An orphan ref is acceptable only if its complete reachable history is independently clean.

requirements: Generated source archives must be enumerated and hash-identical to the reviewed tools tree.
channels.revisit_condition: Retain archive hashes and member manifests for the publication ref.
channels.notes: No current tools source archive has been reviewed.

requirements: Synthetic tool tests must never print user content, gated repository paths, source bytes, or credentials.
channels.revisit_condition: Audit exact workflow commands, fixtures, redaction, and retained logs in the clean tools root.
channels.notes: Tools-only CI must use synthetic inputs.

requirements: Every artifact member must match the exact reviewed tools-only allowlist and contain no DLL, gameplay source, media, object, or private fixture.
channels.revisit_condition: Retain a deterministic artifact manifest, SBOM, checksums, and independent content review.
channels.notes: No current tools-only Actions artifact is authorized.

requirements: Cache content must be unnecessary or exactly limited to independently permitted tools inputs and synthetic outputs.
channels.revisit_condition: Audit exact cache keys, contents, readers, and retention or disable caches in the clean tools root.
channels.notes: No current tools-only cache policy is authorized.

requirements: The tools-progress profile, exact file decisions, clean tree/history, source archive, artifact manifest, SBOM, checksums, and non-playable labeling must all pass.
channels.revisit_condition: Complete the independent tools-rights review and history-clean channel audit for the exact release candidate.
channels.notes: The maximum possible public capability is not yet an eligible release.

requirements: Output remains on the legitimate user's machine under ignored private roots and is never uploaded, attached, shared, or promoted.
channels.revisit_condition: This private engineering channel does not become public; later public rights evidence must use a distinct mode and distributable-input lineage.
channels.notes: Permission here is a project containment rule for local engineering, not a representation about the user's legal rights.

file_allowlist.notes: Candidate exact path; independent authorship and outbound-license approval are pending.
Candidate exact path; independent authorship and outbound-license approval are pending.
Candidate exact path; independent authorship and outbound-license approval are pending.
Candidate exact path; independent authorship and outbound-license approval are pending.
Generated candidate whose exact rendered bytes and scope have not been reviewed.
Generated candidate whose schema and exact rendered bytes have not been reviewed.
Generated candidate whose schema and exact rendered bytes have not been reviewed.
Generated candidate whose complete file and license coverage has not been reviewed.
Candidate verbatim license copy; inclusion does not assign GPL-2.0-only to unreviewed tools.
Candidate verbatim license copy; package-level scope remains unresolved.
Candidate scope notice; the final mode-specific rendering and legal review are pending.
Candidate notice file; exact applicability must be rendered for the actual tools-only package.
Candidate exact version rendering; release identity checks are not implemented.

required_predicates: Every artifact member has an exact permitted file decision and immutable release-manifest hash.
Every source component and generated byte has an applicable outbound license and evidence record.
The complete repository tree and reachable history are the separately reviewed history-clean tools root.
The tools-progress readiness profile passes deterministic, security, SBOM, checksum, and non-playable-label gates.
prohibited_content: DLLs, executables, object files, symbols, compiler output, or dependency binaries
Gameplay or Zaero-derived source, tests, audits, definitions, or references outside the exact file list
Original or imported Zaero media and any local-full output
Files reached only through a broad glob, directory rule, or unreviewed generated archive member
unmet_requirements: Candidate tool and metadata files have not received independent file-level rights approval.
The history-clean tools distribution root and its complete history have not been created and audited.
No tools-only package manifest, SBOM, checksum set, or tools-progress readiness record exists.
All required public channels remain unknown rather than permitted.
modes.notes: This exact candidate list is review input, not an authorization. Unknown file or channel status blocks publication.

required_predicates: Code distribution is permitted for the exact DLL and corresponding source.
No Zaero media is present; completion imports a legitimate user installation locally.
The exact package, notices, SBOM, checksums, source bundle, and playable-candidate or playable-stable readiness record pass.
prohibited_content: Original, extracted, or imported Zaero media
local-full archives or private import ownership manifests
Unreviewed source, binary, dependency, editor, or generated files
unmet_requirements: The importer-kit exact file allowlist and corresponding-source bundle have not been reviewed.
All required gameplay-tree public channels are denied.
modes.notes: A buildable DLL is not permission to distribute it.

required_predicates: Code and media distribution are independently permitted for every exact artifact member and channel.
Media comes from a reviewed distributable-input manifest rather than a user's private import.
The exact package, editor gamepack, notices, SBOM, checksums, source bundle, and playable readiness profile pass.
prohibited_content: Bytes or manifests owned by a user's local import
Unmatched, unknown, expired, or evidence-free asset-policy entries
unmet_requirements: Code and media distribution summaries are false.
No reviewed asset-policy.json or distributable-input manifest exists.
The asset-full exact file allowlist has not been reviewed.
All required gameplay-tree public channels are denied.
modes.notes: Future rights evidence must create this distinct lineage; it can never promote a private local-full package.

required_predicates: The user supplies a legitimate local Zaero installation and all known input hashes validate.
Generated content remains under ignored local roots and retains import and install ownership evidence.
No file, archive, manifest, log, cache, symbol, or screenshot from this lineage enters a public channel.
prohibited_content: Any public upload, release asset, repository object, CI artifact, CI cache, editor package, or corresponding-source publication derived from this private lineage
modes.notes: This private engineering mode is permanently non-publishable regardless of future source or media rights evidence.

non_waivable_rules.description: The exact component rights, distribution mode, and every repository, CI, source, editor, and release channel must be permitted together.
A local-full artifact or any derivative of its private import lineage can never be published or promoted.
The candidate must be built from the recorded clean source commit and allowed distribution root with no dirty or unreviewed bytes.
Tag, VERSION, package metadata, manifests, source, binary, and release notes must identify the same exact release.
Every archive checksum and member must match the exact reviewed per-file allowlist and internal/external manifests.
Required critical security, path-safety, archive, importer, installer, and publisher checks must pass for the exact candidate.
Every shipped byte must have its applicable license and notices; a DLL must have complete corresponding source for the exact binary without implying missing grants.
Every profile-required feature, entity, quirk, map, mode, save, multiplayer, editor, package, and live evidence gate must pass without stale or missing proof.

waiver_policy.notes: A reviewed decision may waive only an explicitly optional or deferred gate and remains visible in readiness output. It can never change a false playable-stable result to true.

notes: This initial policy intentionally authorizes no public distribution. Unknown component or file rights, denied gameplay-tree channels, missing asset policy, and unaudited history-clean tools channels all fail closed.
